creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Kill deskutils/recycler, as the distfile is no longer on its source
site. Furthermore, an investigation of the website seems to indicate
the author has decided to dispose of the program

Fix: 

Remove the deskutils/recycler port from the tree.
How-To-Repeat: 
http://www.aaa-int.or.jp/~jfactory/, note the software up there. Also
note "recycler" is not in there. "recycler"'s distfile does not appear
to be in the dist/ directory in any name or form.
